title: Washington, D.C.
summary: The primary setting of The Division 2, where institutional collapse, civilian reconstruction and competing factions converge around the U.S. capital.

claims.text: The official story premise places Washington on the brink of collapse amid lawlessness, instability and rumours of a Capitol coup.
Several months after the first game's events, Agents across the country are summoned to Washington after the nationwide Division Network goes down.
Ubisoft presents Washington as contested by hostile factions and defended through Division operations and civilian settlements.

paragraphs.text: Washington is not just a backdrop: the failure of the SHD Network and the struggle over federal institutions make the city the strategic center of The Division 2's opening campaign.
The city's neighborhoods, control points and settlements express the continuing conflict between hostile factions, SHD Agents and organized civilians.

verification.notes: District-by-district pages and landmark histories remain a later inventory task.
